issues.description: MedDRA coding must ensure LLT-to-PT hierarchy is complete for all 1,191 AE records
Seriousness flags (AESER, AESCAN, AESCONG, AESDEATH, AESHOSP, AESLIFE, AESOD) require explicit boolean derivation logic
AE start/end date imputation rules (AESTDTC/AEENDTC partial dates) should follow ISO 8601 guidelines
Causality assessment (AEREL) coding must align between SDTM AE and ADaM ADAE analysis datasets
